page_metadata.biotools__summary: TGS-GapCloser is a fast and accurately passing through the Bermuda in large genome using error-prone third-generation long reads.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: TGS-GapCloser is a fast and accurately passing through the Bermuda in large genome using error-prone third-generation long reads.
page_metadata.galaxy__summary: TGS-GapCloser uses error-prone long reads or preassembled contigs to fill N-gap in the genome assembly.
